ai_summary: Century Enka Ltd. has executed a Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with ABREL Century Energy Limited, an SPV, to procure 9.9 MW of wind-solar hybrid power for captive consumption at its Bhosari facility. This strategic move ensures a dedicated renewable energy source, improving energy independence and ESG profile, but requires Century Enka to acquire at least 26% equity in the SPV, which is noted as a related party transaction conducted at arm's length.
